title: Iliad, Book 18: The Shield of Achilles
description: Book 18 of Homer's Iliad: The Shield of Achilles.
introduction: Book 18 of the Iliad: The Shield of Achilles. The Greek text is from the Venetus A manuscript (10th century), the oldest complete manuscript of the Iliad.

translation.original_text: Ὣς οἱ μὲν μάρναντο δέμας πυρὸς αἰθομένοιο.
translation.text: Achilles learned of Patroclus' death and cried out in anguish so terrible that Thetis heard him in the depths of the sea. She came to him and promised new armor from Hephaestus. The god forged a great shield depicting the earth, sea, sky, sun, moon, two cities — one at peace, one at war — fields being plowed, a vineyard, a dance. All of human life on one shield.
